examples: And now esteemed effendi we feast.
When the king learned this, he got angry and sent his men to catch Effendi at once.
I heard a voice calling my name, 'Abdullah Effendi.' I looked around but saw no one.
In the run-up to the first election in yet another new district earlier this year, one academic, Effendi Ghazali, was invited onto a local radio talk show to offer a bit of civic education.
